user_query:
I'm the volunteer historian for our small Jean Lafitte digital archive, and I want to keep our little "CI" tidy before our next committee check-in. Please run a local validation on the exhibits metadata and prepare both meeting notes and an email draft for the volunteer team.

Inputs (already in the workspace):
- data/exhibits.json (our current exhibit records)
- pipeline/config.json (validation configuration)
- scripts/validate.py (local validator)

What I need you to do:
1) Run the validation command exactly as below and produce the report:
   python3 scripts/validate.py --input data/exhibits.json --schema pipeline/config.json --out out/validation-report.json
   - Do not modify input files.
   - The report must be written to out/validation-report.json.

2) Prepare meeting notes at out/meeting-notes.md for the "Jean Lafitte Digital Archives Committee" that include:
   - A Summary section listing the total exhibits, passed, failed, and warnings, matching the counts in out/validation-report.json.
   - A Failures section where each failed exhibit is listed with its id and title plus the issue codes and fields (e.g., DATE_FORMAT(date), MISSING_FIELD(url)) pulled from the report.
   - An Action Items section that, for each failed exhibit, includes at least two bullet items: one assigned to "Archivist" describing the specific data corrections needed based on the issue(s), and one assigned to "Web volunteer" describing link/asset verification tasks (both derived from the issues in the report).
   - A Next Steps line that includes the exact rerun command shown above so the team can re-check after fixes.

3) Draft an email to our volunteer team saved at out/email-to-volunteers.txt with:
   - A Subject line that includes "[QA] Digital Exhibit results" and the counts in the format "X passed, Y failed" (from out/validation-report.json).
   - A brief greeting to "Bayou History Volunteers" and a short summary that cites the same pass/fail totals.
   - A bulleted list of the failed exhibits with their id, title, and a parenthetical of the issue codes with fields (e.g., DATE_FORMAT(date), MISSING_FIELD(url)).
   - The exact rerun command string so volunteers can validate locally.
   - A closing line noting we will review during the next committee meeting and that detailed notes are in out/meeting-notes.md.

Key constraints:
- All figures and issue details in both out/meeting-notes.md and out/email-to-volunteers.txt must be derived from out/validation-report.json (not guessed).
- Save outputs only to the specified paths.
- Keep the tone professional and concise; no extra embellishment.

Deliverables:
- out/validation-report.json (generated by the validator)
- out/meeting-notes.md (meeting-ready notes with action items)
- out/email-to-volunteers.txt (email subject and body) All file paths are relative to the workspace directory.
